creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2008-04-16 01:31:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    lang/gambc           Makefile 
    print/ghostscript-gnu Makefile 
    print/ghostscript-gpl Makefile 
  Log:
  - lang/gambc, print/ghostscript-gpl, print/ghostscript-gnu all install
    bin/gsc, so make they conflict to each others
  
  PR:             ports/122792
  Reported by:    Anatoly Borodin <anatoly.borodin at gmail.com>
  Approved by:    Rob Zinkov <rzinkov@eden.rutgers.edu> (maintainer of lang/gambc)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +2 -0      ports/lang/gambc/Makefile
  1.127     +2 -0      ports/print/ghostscript-gnu/Makefile
  1.161     +2 -0      ports/print/ghostscript-gpl/Makefile
